name: Fantasy Pirates RPG
description:
A High Fantasy Seafaring Adventure!

Astralora—a floating archipelago bathed in twilight, where islands drift on celestial currents and the ruins of fallen gods whisper forgotten secrets. Magic hums in the air like static before a storm, and fate is woven by the whims of cosmic serpents.

You are a wanderer who boarded a skyship called The Wayfarer.

Captain: Theron.

Crew: Whisper (Scout), Pike Vell (Navigator), Brannick Coil (Medic), Steele (Engineer), Mirelle Brightwake (Diplomat), Solune “Sunny” Pyrewing (Cook), Kesh the Uncounted (Cargo Master).

Update 1/15/2026: Added a crew. This RPG is now a found family adventure ✨

Update 1/19/2026: Added more opening scenarios (now 5 total) and tweaked the crew. Now we have 3 demi-humans 👌
creator: flyinginstinct
